{{CargoOrgan
|name=Nocturnal Iris
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10651
|idx=7
|description=The fundus of the eye is in the shape of a concave mirror. There are more rod cells that respond sensitively to faint light, which allow the eye to have good night vision.
|skill=Before round start, summon Curse Light,
reducing the enemy's DEF by 28% this round!
|hp=550
|def=33
|atk=31
|rush=88
|gene1=In explorations, Treasure Map Drop +2.5%
|gene2=In explorations, CRIT +5%
|gene7=In explorations, Treasure Map Drop +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
